author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit c9d57f2. EXIT_NO_MATCHES=1/EXIT_ERROR=2 in shared.rs; every Err(1) site audited: errors (args/regex/IO/lock/script-parse/JSON-invalid) -> 2; clean no-match -> 1 including 'no files found', pipe passthrough (was 0!), and JSON success-with-zero-matches (response body unchanged); errors take precedence over partial success via had_errors tracking in file/script modes; 'nothing to undo' stays 1. BREAKING flagged loudly in CHANGELOG; README documents the table. 5 existing assertions updated, 7 new taxonomy tests. Bonus: hyperfine in the #99 harness no longer trips on no-match runs only-because-error (the --ignore-failure stays since 1 is still nonzero). 23 suites green, clippy/fmt clean.
